items.title: Don't break up NewJeans and I'll forgo $18m payout, says ex-K-pop boss
items.dek: Min Hee-jin has said she "can no longer bear to watch" the group get "torn apart".
items.body: Min Hee-jin has said she "can no longer bear to watch" the group get "torn apart".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Analysis: Trump issues patriotic rallying cry with eye on crucial elections
items.dek: The BBC's Anthony Zurcher says the US president appealed to his base and taunted his opponents in a marathon speech.
items.body: The BBC's Anthony Zurcher says the US president appealed to his base and taunted his opponents in a marathon speech.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Senegal PM proposes tougher anti-LGBT law, doubling prison terms
items.dek: The bill seeks prison terms of five to ten years for what it describes as "acts against nature".
items.body: The bill seeks prison terms of five to ten years for what it describes as "acts against nature".
items.author: IriLine Desk
